texto: When we focus on people and life instead of material possessions and mere wants, there's not much room for emotional hand-wringing. Instead, there's more space to weigh what we value in our lives and to acknowledge what really counts. Chapter 9 Simplicity Laura Ingalls in The Long Winter
explicacao: Citação de Erin Blakemore sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “When we focus on people and life instead of material possessions and mere wants, there's not much…” articula sabedoria, laura-ingalls-wilder, simplicity em registro de sabedoria, com relevância para contextos como simplicity.
